title: Solar Radiance
guidance: Place both palms on the solar plexus, breathe warmth, and chant on the exhale.
notes: Use when the Meaning Block emphasizes visibility and ownership.
human_text: Practice the Solar Radiance mantra for confidence and clear expression. Place both palms on your solar plexus, breathe warmth, and chant on the exhale. This works well when you need to emphasize visibility and ownership.

title: Lunar Soften
guidance: Silently say "So" on the inhale and "Hum" on the exhale while letting the shoulders drop.
notes: Use in Context callouts when Lite highlights emotional protection.
human_text: Practice the Lunar Soften mantra for emotional regulation and acceptance. Silently say "So" on the inhale and "Hum" on the exhale while letting your shoulders drop. This works well when you need emotional protection and regulation.
